Our Story

Where luxury meets wellness

Relax Corner is Nizampet's premier massage and wellness center, designed to give you a true escape from daily stress. Our beautifully designed studio — with its iconic green living wall, warm lighting, and premium massage chairs — creates the perfect environment for deep relaxation.

We offer a range of therapies including full body massage chairs, traditional Kansya Thali foot massage, and foot & calf massage — all at incredibly affordable prices so everyone can experience the gift of relaxation.

📍 Shop No: 01, Road No: 8, Bandari Layout, Nizampet - 500090  |  📞 99497 69049 / 96666 08433

Better sleep

Promotes deeper, more restful sleep patterns overnight.

Flexibility

Loosens tight muscles and improves your range of motion.

👁️

Improves vision

Kansya metal draws heat from the eyes, improving eyesight.

😰

Reduces anxiety

Calms the nervous system and reduces stress and anxiety.

🩸

Circulation

Stimulates nerve endings and improves blood flow.

🌿

Restores luster and renews the skin naturally.

Relieves foot pain

Eases plantar fasciitis, cramps, and joint stiffness.

🩸

Circulation boost

Improves blood flow to the lower extremities.

😴

Better sleep

Evening foot massage significantly improves sleep quality.

🧠

Stress relief

Pressure points on feet connect to the whole body's nervous system.

🏃

Less swelling

Reduces edema and fatigue in legs from long standing or walking.

Especially beneficial in summers, cools the entire body.
